name: Ice Box Canyon Trail
description: This cooler, shaded canyon in Red Rock offers a refreshing escape with seasonal waterfalls and unique plant life.

name: White Domes Loop Trail
description: Explore a fascinating slot canyon and the remnants of an old movie set amidst the vibrant sandstone formations of Valley of Fire.

name: Owl Canyon Trail
description: Wander through a narrow, winding canyon near Lake Mead, known for its interesting rock formations and potential for wildlife sightings.

name: Cathedral Rock Trail
description: Ascend to breathtaking panoramic views of the Spring Mountains and the surrounding desert from the summit of Cathedral Rock.

name: Little Finland Trail
description: Discover an otherworldly landscape of intricately sculpted red sandstone formations resembling fantastic creatures and shapes in Gold Butte.

name: Arizona Hot Spring Trail
description: Embark on a strenuous journey through the rugged Black Canyon to reach natural hot springs along the Colorado River, offering spectacular views.

name: Petroglyph Canyon Trail
description: Hike through a historic canyon in Sloan Canyon National Conservation Area to witness hundreds of ancient Native American petroglyphs etched into the rock.
